title: Request normalization
go_no_go_summary: Claude rated the S02 engineering deliverable GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings. Four P3 notes were optional hardening observations and explicitly deferred because the substantive guarantees are preserved by the fail-closed request-normalization boundary, allowlisted output construction, current validator coverage, and the planned S04 Matter-trace precheck.

findings.title: Input-shape deny tests are thinner than claim deny tests
findings.summary: Claude noted that missing-field, untrimmed-string, and non-string Matter metadata deny branches exist in normalizeControlPlaneClaudeReviewRequest but are not directly covered by the fail-closed table.
findings.resolution: Deferred as optional hardening. The current S02 acceptance gate is covered by policy binding, frozen happy path, unsafe-claim failures, fixture parity, contract validator smoke execution, and assertNormalizedControlPlaneClaudeReviewRequest. Add focused deny rows in a future test-hardening slice if S02 tests are revisited.

findings.title: Request extra keys are tolerated while inputClaims rejects unknown keys
findings.summary: Claude noted an asymmetric strictness rule: unknown truthy inputClaims fail closed, while extra reviewRequest keys are ignored.
findings.resolution: Deferred as optional hardening. The output is constructed only from explicit allowlisted fields and does not reflect unknown request keys, so the product-state and runtime boundaries remain intact.

findings.title: No direct normalizer output deepEqual against fixture normalized_request
findings.summary: Claude noted that the fixture and generated normalized request are each validated field-by-field against shared constants rather than compared directly.
findings.resolution: Deferred as optional hardening. The RP00 validator and service tests already validate policy, normalized fields, arrays, fixture scalars, and normalized request scalars against the same contract constants.

findings.title: Matter ID and Matter tenant pairing intentionally deferred
findings.summary: Claude noted that matter_id and matter_tenant_id are not cross-validated during S02 normalization.
findings.resolution: Deferred by design to RP00.P02.M04.S04 Matter trace precheck. S02 records the metadata without executing the Matter-boundary decision.

invalid_partial_attempts.result: The initial Claude CLI process remained at zero stdout/stderr bytes for more than ten minutes and was manually terminated. It produced no review output and is not counted as the completed review evidence unit.

claude_cli.command: claude -p --add-dir /tmp --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --no-session-persistence --tools Read --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit,Grep,Glob --output-format json

findings.title: Input-shape deny test hardening
findings.summary: Optional additional deny rows could cover missing field, untrimmed string, and non-string Matter metadata.

findings.title: Extra request key symmetry
findings.summary: Extra reviewRequest keys are ignored by allowlisted output construction; inputClaims remains strict.

findings.title: Fixture deepEqual hardening
findings.summary: Current field-by-field fixture and normalized request checks are sufficient for S02.

findings.title: Matter pairing deferred
findings.summary: Matter ID and Matter tenant pair validation is intentionally deferred to S04.

required_followups: Continue with RP00.P02.M04.S03 Tenant boundary precheck as the next subphase.
review_notes: Claude confirmed S02 is a request-normalization deliverable after RP00.P02.M04.S01.
Claude confirmed claude_review is not added to the M00 runtime entrypoint list.
Claude confirmed no runtime Claude invocation, no review queue writes, no audit writes, no service execution, and no runtime route creation.
Claude confirmed the normalized object is frozen and carries tenant, Matter, permission, audit, review context, evidence, acceptance gate, model, effort, and read-only metadata.
Claude confirmed RP00.P02.M04 remains open and the next boundary is RP00.P02.M04.S03.
parsed_review.summary: Claude reported GO and no P0/P1/P2 issues. P3 notes are optional hardening.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings and four P3 optional hardening notes.
